subject: Bug: blog persona selector broken — use header selector only

body.bug: The persona selector on blog posts does not work. The header already has a working persona selector at the top. The blog should read from that selector (localStorage key) rather than implementing its own broken one.
body.fix: Remove the per-post persona selector. Read the persona from the header selector value (localStorage unratified-lens or equivalent). All persona-filtered content should react to the single header selector.
body.principle: Single source of truth for user preference. One selector, all content reacts.
